personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | Observability & Performance Engineering

summary: Senior Data Engineer and Performance Engineering professional with 20+ years of enterprise experience across observability, capacity analytics, and cloud modernization. Hands-on with Dynatrace, CA APM, AppDynamics, and BMC TrueSight, with a strong track record in technical customer-facing delivery, cross-functional collaboration, and translating complex telemetry insights into business outcomes.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built and operated telemetry pipelines (Python, Pandas, SQL) ingesting data from 6,000+ endpoints to drive observability and capacity decisions.
Produced executive-facing dashboards and risk forecasts, translating technical performance signals into clear business recommendations.
Partnered across infrastructure and application teams to troubleshoot performance bottlenecks and improve service reliability.
Managed enterprise monitoring ecosystems including CA APM, AppDynamics, and BMC TrueSight in regulated environments.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and synthetic monitoring for customer-facing digital systems and critical business services.
Led telemetry-driven optimization work through the FAST initiative, identifying bottlenecks and recommending high-impact improvements.
Supported cloud transition initiatives and strengthened end-to-end monitoring coverage across AWS-hosted workloads.

experience.title: Senior Consultant (APM SME)
bullets: Led enterprise APM implementations and upgrades across large environments (4,000-6,000 agents).
Designed custom dashboards, alerts, and management modules to improve incident visibility and response speed.
Worked directly with client technical teams to troubleshoot issues, present recommendations, and guide rollout strategy.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Performed performance diagnostics for high-volume J2EE workloads and documented actionable tuning recommendations.
Instrumented and analyzed JVM/JMX metrics to identify thread, memory, and database bottlenecks.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led a large-scale platform migration from 200+ MySQL nodes to Oracle RAC with strong focus on scale and stability.
Built validation and test frameworks that improved migration confidence and production readiness.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: FAST Performance Analytics Initiative
projects.description: Used Dynatrace telemetry and data analysis to identify user-experience bottlenecks and prioritize improvements for business-critical systems.

projects.name: HorizonScale Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Developed forecasting workflows and dashboards to predict capacity risk and support proactive infrastructure decisions.
